title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Sprinters Stakes, the second G1
sprint race on our list.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This race is only 1,200 meters, just short of a
mile!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Meanin' I can throw caution to the wind and gun
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On top of that, the steep hill right before the
Nakayama Racecourse's finish line calls for a lot
of power. Which means...
choice_data_list: This is the perfect race to show off your skills!
This is the perfect race to show off your skills!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to power and speed, I'm the best
around! I'll prove it to ya!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: So you'd better start plannin' for a party, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Go out there and win it!
Go out there and win it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'll be back in a jiff!
